description: Compare skill-equipped vs. bare-model performance on trait extraction tasks. These tests measure whether the skill's domain knowledge, validation rules, and pipeline structure meaningfully improve extraction quality over a generic LLM prompt.

tests.name: Extraction accuracy: skill vs. bare model
tests.setup: Provide the same 5-species karyotype table to (A) trait-trawler skill and (B) bare Claude with prompt 'Extract karyotype data from this table into CSV format.'
metrics: Number of correctly extracted records (species, 2n, sex chromosome system)
Correct handling of notation variants (Xyp vs XY vs neo-XY)
Presence of confidence scores and provenance fields
tests.expected_improvement: Skill should match or exceed bare model on extraction accuracy while adding confidence scoring, provenance, and validation that bare model omits entirely.

tests.name: Triage precision: skill vs. bare model
tests.setup: Provide 10 abstracts (6 relevant, 4 irrelevant) to (A) trait-trawler with config and (B) bare Claude with prompt 'Which of these abstracts contain karyotype data for beetles?'
metrics: True positive rate (correctly identified relevant abstracts)
False positive rate (irrelevant abstracts incorrectly marked relevant)
Handling of near-miss abstracts (mentions chromosomes but no karyotype data)
tests.expected_improvement: Skill should achieve higher precision on near-miss abstracts due to explicit exclude-keyword rules and domain knowledge in guide.md.

tests.name: Multi-paper session efficiency
tests.setup: Run a 10-paper session with both (A) trait-trawler skill and (B) bare Claude given equivalent instructions. Measure state management, deduplication, and error recovery.
metrics: Recovery from failed PDF retrieval (graceful degradation)
Consistency of output schema across all records
tests.expected_improvement: Skill should produce zero duplicates, consistent schema, and graceful fallback to abstracts. Bare model likely produces schema drift and no state tracking.

tests.name: Taxonomy resolution catches synonyms
tests.setup: Provide records with known synonyms (e.g., Cicindela sylvatica / Cylindera sylvatica) to (A) trait-trawler with taxonomy enabled and (B) bare Claude.
metrics: Synonym pairs correctly identified and merged
Original names preserved in notes field
No phantom species diversity from synonym duplication
tests.expected_improvement: Skill should resolve all known synonyms via GBIF API. Bare model will not attempt taxonomy resolution and will treat synonyms as distinct species.
